note: Corporate multilateral cash netting: 3-entity gross matrix → net positions → settlement legs. NOT FICC margin netting.

vectors.name: three_entity_netting_67pct_savings
vectors.description: 3 entities (A, B, C): 3 gross legs, 2 net settlement legs, 33.33% wire-count savings, 83.33% netting efficiency.

output_payload.table_source: SWIFT gpi multilateral netting guide; ISO 20022 pacs.010 Financial Institution Credit Transfer; BIS CPMI net settlement framework 2012
output_payload.regulatory_basis: Multilateral netting per SWIFT gpi multilateral netting guide; BIS CPMI net settlement framework (2012, cpmi96). NOT estimate_ficc_margin_netting (FICC clearing margin netting). This node computes corporate CASH netting for TMS / in-house-bank settlement cycles. Netting statement suitable for anchor_batch Merkle-leaf receipts.
output_payload.pii_note: ZERO PII: entity IDs, currency codes, and amounts only. No account holder, beneficial owner, or personal data enters this kernel.
output_payload.not_legal_advice: Not legal or accounting advice. Netting arrangements must be validated under applicable netting law (e.g. ISDA master netting agreement, national netting legislation).
output_payload.anchor_surface: anchor.ainumbers.co/mcp -- use anchor_batch to anchor the netting statement as a Merkle tree (one leaf per entity). Each entity receives an individual inclusion proof of the same net settlement cycle.

vectors.name: two_entity_bilateral_netting
